content: The only thing I'm curious about ult, is why the weapon's passive abilities aren't saved when the ultimate be activated. In theory, it should work like the Toxic Medic's.

The problem with this class is that it's actually balanced, unlike all the others. It doesn't have any broken mechanics (yes, I know about the Thermal Grenade, but right now it can only kill DPS, and not always. Any DPS in the game can easily kill Demo, due to the latter's lack of healing, weapon damage, and speed boost. Plus, it has a 30-second cooldown and needs to be charged. It's not a shitty DBS with endless shots and gigantic damage, but just one shot that is countered by a multitude of mechanics for health, damage reduction, armor, and healing). So, let's take it step by step.
1) Turret - when making a skill like this, you need to either make it slow but with high damage, or fast but with reduced damage. In the game, it's slow and weak. What's the problem with adding a second turret? That way, you'll compensate for both the damage and the speed at which that damage is dealt. 2) Seeker Mine is a pretty well-designed skill, but it needs a little more damage, at least 15-20% of its current value, and the delay before detonation should be removed.
3) Ultimate is the only skill that doesn't need to be reworked. An excellent choice between stuns and nukes.
4) Passive Bleeding. Why only 4 stacks? Either increase the number of stacks or tie its damage to a percentage of the target's HP. This makes sense: the larger the target, the more HP they lose. This will make Demos more useful against players with high health.

P.S. Either Demos needs to be improved or everyone else needs to be leveled up against him, because, again, if your game didn't have such powerful characters and builds with DBS, all classes would be at least equal.

P.P.S. I don't understand why you didn't add % HP damage to the demo, or some kind of anti-heal to the toxic medic. Since you have so many damage reduction mechanics, you should think about it.
the turret damage is absurd low.

in FIELD GRENADIER, There is a talent called (Air Burst), it says "Grants 27% chance of adding 1 additional stack(s) of FIERY when hitting an enemy with a Skill or Grenade"

Bruh as if Demolitionist Skills has low cooldowns to proc this 27% chance? 😭  imagine that low chance while your skills has long cooldowns, lmao. Field Grenadier talents are all proc chance based, while their class power heavy relies on "Casting-skill-first-to-become-useful" yet their talent tree is not suit to their own playstyle.

I suggest to revamp FIELD GRENADIER and make their talent tree be perfect for their playstyle, and enough of the proc-chance based talent to be useful, because Demolitionist Skills are not low cooldown for Field Grenadier playstyle.

Rework field grenadier completely, needs to stand out more, visuals skill effects, maybe more grenades. Increase the amount of damage they do. The class scaling makes to firepower, then the skills do bad damage, should have some from the firepower instead. The artillery turrent shooting for low damage is ridiculous. The M32A1 grenade launcher skill Shooting 6 motars at someone and it barely even scratches them just isn't realistic 😂 Give them like a incendiary grenade (firepower based) or something. 💥 They need to live up to their name.  Example... Aegis has certain damage chips that do effects based from engineering stats, but do one for them based off 'x' of firepower. The entire talent tree could benefit this, grenadier should have more areas all around that that can benefit from having firepower. I know throwing grenades further would help too.

It feels like demo is not balanced right.

I have a fine tuned **HE Munitions** build: correct gear sets and skill mods, etc. 

When i switch to **Field Grenadier**, with the completely wrong gear, bad skill sets and i have barely gone though the agent manual for this spec focus -- _my power only drops by 200_.  that seems far too small. i have no sets/skills tuned, so it should be a LOT less. what's going on?
While I do like the dots I think HE demo should lean into more high damage slow firing skills. More damage on the seeker and artillery would be nice
Increase the dots ( damage over time ) for artillery, grenades and seeker mines.
For HE munitions that is not ideal since that’s a stat not engineering related at all

referenced_message.author: jhieswagger1
referenced_message.content: how about increase firing speed of artillery turret by using rate of fire

content: Demo skills don’t return drops in the same way as shooting does. I know it’s a bit easier with demo but there should be a way to improve the drop rate.

The Grenade launcher ult when built correctly does absolutely way too much damage. Combined with the stun on it makes it way too strong. Either the damage needs to be lowered or the stun needs removal.(PvP)
how about increase firing speed of artillery turret by using rate of fire

Demo HE definitely feels lacking when compared to other dps classes. I would like to see more damage or better frequency of skills to help us keep up with other classes.
As it stands vanguards blow us out the water with no effort and from my testing pharma feels much better to use
Demonlitionist needs changing and I'm going to tell you why!
